judge_reason: Description B provides specific, conflicting verbatim text from stamps (e.g., 'B I', 'MR. JONES', specific dates) that Description A does not mention and which directly contradict the general description of stamps being 'some oriented upside-down'.
original_image_tags: A single page from a lined notepad, showing the back/verso side. The page is mostly blank with horizontal blue lines and a red vertical margin line on the left. At the top edge, there are two hole-punch remnants (dark circular stains). The bottom third contains several stamped impressions, some oriented upside-down relative to the page's primary orientation.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned blank lined index card or document page with three punched holes along the top edge and one punched hole near the right edge; faint stamped text is visible near the lower center, including red and green date-like markings.*
